overall.description: Third-person gameplay from GTA: San Andreas showing the character CJ running along Verona Beach at sunset. The character moves from a concrete promenade past palm trees and beachgoers, transitioning onto a wooden boardwalk approaching art deco buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: CJ running steadily along the concrete beachfront path with the beach on his left

entered.detail: elevated highway overpass with concrete supports
multi-story residential building with lit windows
tall palm trees lining the right side of the path
sandy beach area sloping down to the water
paved pedestrian walkway with yellow line marking

segments.scene_description: CJ runs along a concrete beachfront path with an elevated highway overpass and apartment building on the left, and palm trees lining the right. The beach sand stretches to the left while the orange sunset sky dominates the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved beachfront path with ocean view

events.description: full moon becomes visible against the orange sunset sky
path curves to the right revealing more of the ocean view

agents.ego_description: CJ continues running along the curving path, passing pedestrians and benches while the beach opens up to the ocean

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple shirt walking on the sand parallel to the path

entered.detail: open ocean visible beyond the beach with horizon line
full moon visible in the orange sunset sky
wooden benches along the right side of the path
pastel-colored art deco style buildings approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path curves along the beach revealing the ocean on the right as the moon rises against the sunset. CJ passes benches and scattered pedestrians while palm trees shift to line the left side of the path, and art deco buildings become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk ramp leading to art deco buildings

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete sidewalk to wooden boardwalk planks
entering Verona Beach area with prominent art deco architecture on left

agents.ego_description: CJ runs up the wooden boardwalk ramp toward the buildings, passing pedestrians coming down

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking down the wooden boardwalk

entered.detail: wooden plank ramp leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: CJ transitions onto a wooden boardwalk leading up to colorful art deco buildings. The beach and ocean exit the frame as the character approaches the Verona Beach building complex, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction on the ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs along a coastal promenade that transitions from an open beachfront into a dense urban art deco district. It begins on a concrete path flanked by an elevated highway and apartment buildings, with palm trees lining the route under a dominant orange sunset sky. As the path curves, the ocean reveals itself on the right and the moon rises in the background, while the palm trees shift to the left and distant art deco architecture comes into view. The scene then shifts as the character moves from the concrete onto a wooden boardwalk, causing the beach and ocean to exit the frame. Finally, the camera follows the character up a ramp past oncoming pedestrians and toward the colorful building complex of Verona Beach.
